arts.ttl: Why Vinicius Junior Isn't Playing for Real Madrid vs. Brest
arts.sum: Vinícius Júnior must serve his one-game suspension for yellow card accumulation in the Champions League against Brest.

arts.ttl: Official: 3 changes as Real Madrid name XI to face Brest
arts.sum: The XI of players set to be depended upon by La Liga champions Real Madrid to get the better of Stade Brestois on Wednesday evening has come to the fore…

arts.ttl: How Mbappe & Bellingham sparked Real Madrid's resurgence
arts.sum: As Real Madrid prepare for their Champions League finale, Spanish football expert Guillem Balague looks at how the defending champions have found their form.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Brest vs Real Madrid, 2025 Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Brest in the Champions League . Real Madrid starting XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Tchouameni, Rudiger, Mendy, Modric, Bellingham, Valverde, Brahim, Rodrygo, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Three Real Madrid no-shows to Vini Jr party invite
arts.sum: With extravagant gifts being handed out to the players and even a special guest in attendance, the care and attention Vini Jr is showing to his teammates is doing a very good job of playing down those Saudi rumours that are as stubborn as one of those bathroom smells even Vini’s luxury air freshener can’t quite mask. But for three Real Madrid players, the invite wasn’t enough.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'close the door on January move for Liverpool's Trent Alexander-Arnold' after two failed bids
arts.sum: Madrid's interest in the 26-year-old is no secret and he could still end up at the Bernabeu. If he does not sign a new contract then he will be able to leave for free after his current deal expires on June 30.

arts.ttl: Leaked: Real Madrid’s away jersey for next season
arts.sum: A first image of the kit expected to be made use of by La Liga giants Real Madrid in away fixtures next season has on Wednesday come to the fore…

arts.ttl: Vinícius Jr’s personal gift to Real Madrid teammates revealed
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. recently handed each and every one of his teammates a personal gift. That’s according to Diario AS, who have on Wednesday provided an insight into…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti speaks out on potential Vinícius Jr. move to Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided his take on the ongoing speculation linking star attacker Vinícius Jr. with a move to Saudi Arabia. Surprise rumours linking wide-man Vinícius…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s new kit for 2025/26 is a throwback to Cristiano’s first season
arts.sum: According to Footy Headlines, the first kit will be white with gray details on the collar, the three classic Adidas stripes in black, and shirt sponsor logo also in black. Every year, new jerseys create a frenzy among fans, and details about Real Madrid’s first, second and third kits for the upcoming season are starting to emerge.
